description: Public REST API + OpenAPI Docs: Generate OpenAPI 3.0 spec, serve API documentation at /api/docs, implement API key authentication, rate limiting per plan (Free: 100/hr, Pro: 1000/hr, Enterprise: 10000/hr), and API key usage tracking.
steps: Add Prisma models: `ApiKey` (id, workspaceId, name, key:String @unique, prefix:String, permissions:String[], isActive:Boolean, lastUsedAt:DateTime?, requestCount:Int, createdAt, updatedAt) and `ApiKeyUsage` (id, apiKeyId, endpoint:String, method:String, statusCode:Int, responseTimeMs:Int, createdAt). Add indexes.
Create Prisma migration for ApiKey and ApiKeyUsage models.

Create `apps/api/src/middleware/api-key-auth.ts`: Middleware that checks for X-API-Key header, validates against DB, checks if active, updates lastUsedAt. Attaches workspace context to request. Falls through to requireAuth if no API key present.

Create `apps/api/src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts`: In-memory rate limiter (using a Map with sliding window). Rate limits based on plan: free=100 req/hr, pro=1000 req/hr, enterprise=10000 req/hr. Returns 429 with Retry-After header when exceeded. Adds X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset headers.

Create `apps/api/src/services/api-keys.ts`: Service for managing API keys. Functions: `generateApiKey(workspaceId, name, permissions)`, `revokeApiKey(keyId)`, `listApiKeys(workspaceId)`, `validateApiKey(key)`, `trackUsage(apiKeyId, endpoint, method, statusCode, responseTimeMs)`, `getUsageStats(apiKeyId, startDate, endDate)`.

Create `apps/api/src/routes/api-keys.ts`: POST /api/api-keys (create new key - returns full key only once), GET /api/api-keys (list keys for workspace, masked), DELETE /api/api-keys/:id (revoke), GET /api/api-keys/:id/usage (usage stats).

Create `apps/api/src/services/openapi-spec.ts`: Define the OpenAPI 3.0 spec as a TypeScript object covering the main public API endpoints (leads, campaigns, templates, groups, messages, sequences). Include request/response schemas, authentication (Bearer + API Key), pagination, error format.

Create `apps/api/src/routes/docs.ts`: Serve the OpenAPI spec as JSON at GET /api/docs/openapi.json. Serve a simple HTML page at GET /api/docs that renders the spec using Swagger UI CDN (inline HTML with script tag pointing to CDN).
Register docs routes (no auth required) and api-keys routes (requireAuth) in apps/api/src/index.ts. Apply rate-limiter middleware to all /api/* routes when API key auth is used.
Add shared types: API_KEY_PERMISSION const array in packages/shared/src/types/index.ts.
Update mockDb.ts: Add `apiKey` and `apiKeyUsage` mock models. Add `buildApiKey()` and `buildApiKeyUsage()` factories.
Create `apps/api/src/middleware/api-key-auth.test.ts`: Test API key validation, rejection of invalid/inactive keys.
Create `apps/api/src/middleware/rate-limiter.test.ts`: Test rate limiting logic, correct headers, 429 response when exceeded.
Create `apps/api/src/routes/api-keys.test.ts`: Test CRUD operations for API keys, usage stats endpoint.
Create `apps/api/src/services/api-keys.test.ts`: Test key generation, validation, usage tracking.
Frontend: Create `apps/web/src/pages/ApiKeys.tsx`: Page to manage API keys (create, list, revoke, view usage). Show key only once on creation. Copy-to-clipboard button.
Frontend: Add link to API Docs page in sidebar under a 'Developer' section.
acceptance_criteria: API keys can be created, listed (masked), and revoked
X-API-Key header authentication works as alternative to Bearer token
Rate limiting enforces plan-based limits (100/1000/10000 per hour)
Rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-*) are present on responses when using API key
429 response returned when rate limit exceeded
API key usage is tracked per request
findings: Pre-existing build failures in @leadgenius/api (test/simulation.test.ts TypeScript errors) and @leadgenius/workers (rootDir constraint issues) are not related to this feature. All API tests (1145) and web tests (104) pass. The shared package and web app build cleanly.
